member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.BuiltIn.BannedKeywordsGuardrail
member.summary: Blocks any content that contains a banned keyword (case-insensitive). Configure the keyword list via GuardrailConfig.BannedKeywords or pass directly.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.BuiltIn.ContentLengthGuardrail
member.summary: Blocks content that exceeds a configured character limit. Apply separate instances for input and output limits.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.BuiltIn.DataClassificationGuardrail
member.summary: Classifies content by sensitivity level and attaches the classification as metadata. Never blocks — always allows but emits a warning when the classification exceeds Internal, enabling downstream logging and audit.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.BuiltIn.PiiGuardrail
member.summary: Detects and redacts common PII patterns (email, phone, SSN, credit card, IP address). Default action is Redact — sensitive values are replaced with typed placeholders so execution can continue with sanitised content.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.BuiltIn.PromptInjectionGuardrail
member.summary: Detects prompt injection attempts — phrases designed to override system instructions or assume an unauthorized identity/role. Scope: Input only (attacks originate in user-controlled content).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.BuiltIn.ToolScopeGuardrail
member.summary: Enforces a whitelist and/or blacklist of permitted tool IDs. When AllowedToolIds is provided, only those tool IDs may execute. When DeniedToolIds is provided, those tool IDs are always blocked. Denied list takes precedence over allowed list.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Contracts.IGuardrail.Scope
member.summary: Which pipeline stage(s) this guardrail runs in.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Contracts.IGuardrailPipeline.EvaluateInputAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluate the user prompt / plan input before it reaches the planner or LLM. Returns a redacted SafeContent when PII or banned content is found and the configured action is Redact rather than Block.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Contracts.IGuardrailPipeline.EvaluateOutputAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluate an LLM response or execution output after it is produced but before it is committed or returned to the caller.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Contracts.IGuardrailPipeline.EvaluateToolCallAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluate a tool call before it executes. toolInputs are the resolved parameters; toolOutputs is null at call time and populated for post-call checks.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Guardrails.DependencyInjection.GuardrailServiceCollectionExtensions.AddGuardrails(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Valaiorp.Guardrails.DependencyInjection.GuardrailOptions})
member.summary: Registers a pre-configured with the built-in guardrails enabled according to the provided options.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Guardrails.DependencyInjection.GuardrailOptions.AddCustomGuardrail(Valaiorp.Guardrails.Contracts.IGuardrail)
member.summary: Add a custom IGuardrail implementation to the pipeline.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.DataClassification.Public
member.summary: No restrictions — safe for public consumption.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.DataClassification.Internal
member.summary: Internal company data — not for external sharing.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.DataClassification.Confidential
member.summary: Sensitive business data — restricted distribution.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.DataClassification.Restricted
member.summary: Highly sensitive data (PII, credentials, secrets) — strict access controls.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.GuardrailScope.Input
member.summary: Evaluates user prompts and plan inputs before they reach the planner or LLM.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.GuardrailScope.Output
member.summary: Evaluates LLM responses and execution outputs before they are committed.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.GuardrailScope.Tool
member.summary: Evaluates tool calls — validates the toolId and its input parameters.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.GuardrailScope.All
member.summary: Runs for every evaluation scope (input, output, and tool).

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.ViolationAction.Block
member.summary: Reject the content. Execution stops and an error is returned to the caller.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.ViolationAction.Redact
member.summary: Sanitize the content and continue execution with the safe version.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.ViolationAction.Warn
member.summary: Allow the content but emit a warning for audit purposes.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Enums.ViolationAction.Escalate
member.summary: Block and route to the escalation handler for human review.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Models.GuardrailContext.Content
member.summary: The text to evaluate (user prompt for Input; LLM response for Output).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Models.GuardrailContext.ToolId
member.summary: Tool identifier — set for Tool-scope evaluations.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Models.GuardrailContext.ToolInputs
member.summary: Tool input parameters — set for Tool-scope evaluations.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Models.GuardrailContext.ToolOutputs
member.summary: Tool output values — set when evaluating post-tool results.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Models.GuardrailResult.SafeContent
member.summary: Sanitized content returned when Action is Redact. The caller should use this in place of the original content.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Guardrails.Pipeline.GuardrailPipeline
member.summary:
Runs all registered guardrails in insertion order for each scope.
Evaluation rules: Block or Escalate — first violation wins; pipeline stops immediately. Redact — redacted content is forwarded to the next guardrail. Warn — logged in the result metadata; pipeline continues.
